title: CLOUDSAT Downlink
short description: Dump to European ground station from the CLOUDSAT cloud profiling satellite. CLOUDSAT has a CPR (Cloud Profiling Radar) that operates at 94 GHz to create a vertical sounding (cross-section) of the atmosphere.
description:
CLOUDSAT is a NASA satellite with a single instrument, a CPR (Cloud Profiling Radar) that operates at 94 GHz to create a **vertical** sounding (cross section) of the atmosphere (as opposed to most satellites that provide horizontal profiles)

It dumps in S-band to a European ground station 12 orbits worth of data.

 [Baseband recording](https://cdn.rgbcraft.com/altro/basebands/CLOUDSAT.wav)
